tools.name: smsVoice.createConfigurationSet
tools.description: Create a new configuration set. After you create the configuration set, you can add one or more event destinations to it.

tools.name: smsVoice.createConfigurationSetEventDestination
tools.description: Create a new event destination in a configuration set.

tools.name: smsVoice.deleteConfigurationSetEventDestination
tools.description: Deletes an event destination in a configuration set.

tools.name: smsVoice.getConfigurationSetEventDestinations
tools.description: Obtain information about an event destination, including the types of events it reports, the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the destination, and the name of the event destination.

tools.name: smsVoice.listConfigurationSets
tools.description: List all of the configuration sets associated with your Amazon Pinpoint account in the current region.

tools.name: smsVoice.sendVoiceMessage
tools.description: Create a new voice message and send it to a recipient's phone number.

tools.name: smsVoice.updateConfigurationSetEventDestination
tools.description: Update an event destination in a configuration set. An event destination is a location that you publish information about your voice calls to. For example, you can log an event to an Amazon CloudWatch destination when a call fails.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
